description:
GIVEN a logged in user is entitled for SNY RSN
AND the user is playing back the SNY 24/7 stream

steps.action:
WHEN the user presses the "select" button on the controller
AND the user presses the "select" button again after a a minute
steps.result:
THEN video playback pauses after the first button press
AND video playback resumes after the second button press
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
AND the live indicator is grey, indicating not at the live point
AND the "Jump to Live" button displays right justified above the scrubber bar
